name: Egg Casserole
servings: serves 12 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 35-40 minutes
method: In a 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange the English muffins. Top with the Canadian bacon.
In a large mixing bowl, add the eggs, milk, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika. Mix until just combined.
Pour the egg and milk mixture on top of the English muffins.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden-brown in color.
Top with the chopped parsley before serving.
